name: Solera Automotive Claims & Data API
what_it_does: Solera REST API for automotive claims management and vehicle data platform. Enables AI agents to manage vehicle damage assessment and repair estimates, handle total loss valuation and settlement, access claims workflow automation, retrieve vehicle VIN and history data, manage shop and repair facility assignment, handle subrogation and recovery management, access automotive parts and labor data, retrieve claims analytics and cycle time data, manage glass claims and FNOL, and integrate automotive insurance claims with carrier and collision repair systems.
use_cases: Managing vehicle damage estimates and repair assignments from auto claims agents
Processing total loss valuations from insurance claims automation agents
Retrieving vehicle VIN and history data from automotive underwriting agents
Accessing claims analytics and cycle time from auto insurance intelligence agents
not_for: Non-automotive insurance without vehicle damage and repair workflow focus
General property insurance without automotive-specific claims and estimating
Consumer auto shopping without insurance claims and repair management
best_when: A P&C auto insurer, collision repair network, or automotive claims organization using Solera wants AI agents to automate damage assessment, total loss valuation, repair assignment, claims cycle time, and carrier-shop integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Vehicle claims data includes sensitive accident, injury, and property damage information. Total loss valuations affect settlement amounts — errors create financial liability. VIN and vehicle history data has data redistribution restrictions. Subrogation automation must comply with insurance regulations.

auth.notes: Solera uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with claims, vehicle, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Audatex (estimating) and Hollander (recycled parts) are Solera products. Partner integration program.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — automotive claims enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-claim and volume enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Westlake, Texas. Founded 2005. Global automotive claims and vehicle data platform. Acquired by Vista Equity Partners 2016 for $6.5B. Revenue $2B+. Products include Audatex (estimating), Hollander (recycled parts), and SambaSafety (driver monitoring). Used by major P&C auto insurers and collision repair networks globally. Competes with CCC Intelligent Solutions for auto claims.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Total loss valuations affect settlement — automation errors create financial liability
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with enterprise partner program
Multi-product platform (Audatex, Hollander) — separate APIs per product; verify which to use
VIN and vehicle history data has redistribution restrictions — verify licensing before exposing to end users
Subrogation and recovery automation requires insurance regulatory compliance per state
Collision repair network assignment must respect DRP (direct repair program) agreements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive claims and vehicle data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Claims settlement sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Automotive claims data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Vehicle data redistribution restrictions.
